summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LeadixAI premium UI polish iteration 3. Achieved excellent premium design quality with Stripe/Linear/Notion level polish. All major visual and interactive elements working perfectly with minor navigation issues identified.

integration_issues.issue: Next.js RSC payload fetch errors when navigating to /signup and /pricing via Link components
integration_issues.workaround: Direct URL access works fine, only client-side navigation affected

integration_issues.issue: Full Name field required but not clearly indicated in form flow

passed_tests: Landing page loads with premium hero animations and gradient 'Leads' text
Floating dashboard preview with smooth animations and premium styling
Navbar with glassmorphism effect on scroll activation
Trust strip with company logos and premium typography
Problem/Solution section with enhanced card styling and hover effects
Features section with gradient icons and bullet points
How It Works section with connecting line and step indicators
Demo Preview section with interactive elements
Testimonials section with metrics badges and premium card design
Final CTA section with gradient 'lead machine' text
Footer with 5-column layout, brand description, and social icons
Pricing page with enhanced Pro plan glow and 'Most Popular' badge
FAQ accordion with glow effect on open state
Feature comparison table with premium styling
Trust signals below pricing cards
Login page with demo authentication working (any email/password)
Dashboard with premium action center, metric cards, and gradient backgrounds
Sidebar navigation with proper styling
Quick actions with gradient icons and descriptions
Scroll-based navigation (Features → #features, How It Works → #how-it-works)
Mobile responsiveness with mobile menu and proper layout
Premium UI effects: framer-motion animations, glassmorphism, gradients, shadows
Enhanced gradient system (#2563EB → #7C3AED → #9333EA)
Stroke/border system (rgba(0,0,0,0.06)) throughout the design
Glass+depth effects on cards and interactive elements
Rich typography with proper font weights and spacing
Content depth with micro-copy and detailed descriptions
Scroll-responsive navbar behavior
Premium card designs with hover effects and shadows
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Next.js client-side navigation issues for CTA buttons (RSC payload fetch errors). Consider adding error boundaries or fallback navigation for better UX.
